text:
Alex Johnson
Email: alex.johnson@example.com | Phone: +1-555-0134 | Location: Austin, TX

Summary
Data Scientist with 6 years of experience building ML products in fintech and SaaS. Focused on churn prediction, NLP, and real-time analytics.

Skills
Python, SQL, Spark, scikit-learn, PyTorch, XGBoost, Airflow, Docker, AWS (S3, SageMaker, Lambda), Tableau

Experience
Senior Data Scientist — BlueWave Analytics (Jan 2021 – Present)
- Led churn prediction model that reduced customer attrition by 18% using XGBoost and SHAP.
- Built real-time anomaly detection pipeline in Spark Streaming for payment risk.
- Partnered with Product to ship an NLP-powered feedback classifier (BERT) with 0.89 F1.

Data Scientist — Pixel Labs (Jun 2018 – Dec 2020)
- Designed A/B testing framework for onboarding experiments, improving activation by 12%.
- Created feature store in AWS S3 + Glue; reduced training time by 30%.
- Built dashboards in Tableau for executive reporting.

Projects
- SmartSupport: fine-tuned transformer model to route customer tickets; reduced response time by 22%.
- Retail Demand Forecasting: LSTM model for weekly SKU demand, achieving MAPE of 8.5%.

Education
M.S. Data Science — University of Texas at Austin (2018)
B.S. Computer Science — Texas A&M University (2016)

Certifications
AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2022)
